case_title: CHERILYN ABAYE VS. HECTOR MARTINEZ SR et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABAYE, CHERILYN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ SR, HECTOR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-02-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
